t.t-value: [sort for sort in website_sale_sortable if sort[0]==request.params.get('order', '')]

div.t-attf-class: o_pricelist_dropdown dropdown#{'' if website_sale_pricelists and len(website_sale_pricelists)>1 else ' d-none'}

a.class: dropdown-toggle btn btn-link px-0 text-body shadow-none
dropdown-toggle btn btn-link px-0 text-body shadow-none

a.title: Grid View
a.t-attf-class: btn btn-light border bg-white shadow-none text-muted #{view_mode == 'grid' and 'active text-primary' or ''}

a.title: List View
a.t-attf-class: btn btn-light border bg-white shadow-none text-muted #{view_mode == 'list' and 'active text-primary' or ''}

div.t-attf-class: col-lg-3 #{_config_shop_filters.get('filter_position') == 'right' and 'order-1' or None} #{_config_shop_filters.get('show_in_sidebar') and 'd-none' or 'd-none d-lg-block'}

div.data-editor-message: Drag offer blocks here to customize

t.t: Drag building blocks here to customize the header for "" category.

div.t-attf-class: row row-cols-2 row-cols-md-#{ppr >= 3 and 3 or ppr} row-cols-lg-#{ppr} g-2 g-lg-3 mt-0

div.class: d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-center my-4 tp-product-pager

t.t: Drag building blocks here to customize the footer for "" category.

div.div: Click'New' in the top-right corner to create your first product.

div.p: Please check the spelling or try searching something else

t.t-value: keep('/shop'+ ('/category/'+slug(category)) if category else None, search=0) or '/shop'

div.div: Click'New' in the top-right corner to create your first product.

a.t-attf-class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-start-0 border-end-0 py-3 {{_current_sort == sortby[0] and 'active'}}

a.t-att-href: category.parent_id and keep('/shop/category/%s' % slug(category.parent_id), category=0) or '/shop'

div.class: mt-3 mb-0 d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center column-gap-3 row-gap-2
tp-attribute d-flex align-items-center gap-1 cursor-pointer clear

button.t-attf-class: btn btn-link p-0 tp-action-buttons-toggler d-lg-none #{'d-none' if not _dr_any_action_enabled else ''}

button.class: btn btn-link p-0 o_add_wishlist d-none d-lg-flex tp-action-toggle
button.title: Add to Wishlist

button.class: d-none d-lg-flex btn btn-link p-0 o_add_compare tp-action-toggle
button.title: Add to Compare

t.t-if: 'base_price' in template_price_vals and (template_price_vals['base_price'] > template_price_vals['price_reduce']) and (template_price_vals['price_reduce'] or not website.prevent_zero_price_sale)
t.name: product_base_price

a.class: text-muted text-truncate text-center text-md-start mb-1 d-block
text-muted text-truncate text-center text-md-start mb-1 d-block

div.t-if: _config_product_item.get('show_add_to_cart') and variant and (template_price_vals or not website.prevent_zero_price_sale) and product._website_show_quick_add()
_config_product_item.get('show_add_to_cart') and variant and (template_price_vals or not website.prevent_zero_price_sale) and product._website_show_quick_add()

a.class: a-submit btn btn-primary w-100 shadow-none rounded-0
a.title: Shopping cart

div.class: tp-product-content border-top p-2 position-relative text-center text-lg-start

t.t-valuef: bg-white mt-1 p-lg-2 pt-lg-0 justify-content-center justify-content-lg-start

div.t-if: _config_product_item.get('show_add_to_cart') and variant and (template_price_vals or not website.prevent_zero_price_sale) and product._website_show_quick_add()

a.class: a-submit btn btn-primary w-100 shadow-none rounded-pill
a.title: Shopping cart

t.t-valuef: bg-white mt-1 mt-lg-0 flex-grow-1 justify-content-center justify-content-lg-end

ul.class: nav nav-pills flex-column ms-0 flex-nowrap tp-filter-attribute-scrollbar
nav nav-pills flex-column ms-0 flex-nowrap tp-filter-attribute-scrollbar

input.name: rating
input.t-att-checked: 'checked' if rating in selected_ratings else None

div.t-attf-class: tp-accordion-item #{_filter_collapsible and 'collapsible' or None} #{(is_selected or not _filter_collapsible) and 'expanded' or None}

div.t-attf-style: #{(is_selected or not _filter_collapsible) and 'max-height: none;' or None}

ul.class: nav nav-pills flex-column ms-0 flex-nowrap tp-filter-attribute-scrollbar

t.t-foreach: items.sorted(lambda i: i.id in selected, reverse=True)

li.t-if: (count_list.get(item.id) or item.id in selected) if hide_extra_value else True

input.t-att-checked: 'checked' if item.id in selected else None

span.t-attf-style: background-color: #{item.html_color or item.name if not item.is_custom else ''}

template.name: Theme Prime: See More Attributes Button

t.t-foreach: items.sorted(lambda i: i.id in selected, reverse=True)

input.t-att-checked: 'checked' if item.id in selected else None

div.t-attf-class: d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center gap-3 #{_is_rtl and 'flex-row-reverse' or ''}
